component.name: IoExplorer
component.summary: Wayland-native file manager for Hyprland desktops

description.p: IoExplorer is a provider-oriented graphical file manager built with Rust and GTK4 for Wayland desktops.
The initial release focuses on local filesystem browsing, list and icon layouts, editable path navigation, theme customization, and native file drag-and-drop.
Initial MVP scaffold with local browsing, theming foundations, and Wayland drag-and-drop hooks.
